creator: koobs@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to kunda from comment #9)

Please don't just 'bump' issues

In order to progress an issue, either:

- Update metadata fields (that you can) to clarify/update issue state, OR
- Include a comment on what needs to be done to progress the issue (if that is clear)

In this case, a QA'd patch has been provided, but maintainer-approval has been set to ?, which isn't required as the port has no maintainer

A link in the URL field to the software's changelog for the 2.4.4 version would be nice too
